about.title: About me
about.description: Full Stack Web Developer with more than 4 years of experience. I have contributed to software development and implemented new features across various projects, optimizing performance and enhancing user experience. I am passionate about creating efficient and innovative solutions.

soft_skills.name: Teamwork
soft_skills.experience: Collaborative development across multiple teams and projects

soft_skills.name: Self-taught
soft_skills.experience: Continuous learning across AI, backend, and frontend technologies

soft_skills.name: Adaptability
soft_skills.experience: Quickly learning new tools for AI integration and production systems

soft_skills.name: Problem-solving
soft_skills.experience: Optimization, debugging, and system design challenges

soft_skills.name: Analytical thinking
soft_skills.experience: Data-driven decision making for AI and system improvements

soft_skills.name: Attention to detail
soft_skills.experience: Code quality, security, and API precision

soft_skills.name: Autonomy and proactivity
soft_skills.experience: Leading AI projects and independent full-stack development

soft_skills.name: Ability to learn
soft_skills.experience: Mastering new AI technologies, LLMs, and modern frameworks

achievements: Built a production RAG chatbot system with LangChain, OpenAI API, and MongoDB Atlas that processes 500+ daily conversations with 90%+ accuracy on domain-specific queries.
Deployed a multi-platform chatbot service (FastAPI) across Telegram, WhatsApp, and web, serving 100+ concurrent users with persistent conversation context and semantic memory.
Engineered prompt optimization and caching strategies that reduced LLM inference costs by ~40% while maintaining response quality for complex RAG workflows.
Developed an AI content moderation service using image recognition models, achieving 85%+ accuracy on inappropriate content detection with real-time FastAPI inference.
Designed an OCR RESTful API with Google Cloud Vision to extract text from official documents (DNI, passports, etc.).
Implemented spatial text analysis that detects document type and country of origin.
Improved accuracy of key fields (names, IDs, dates) through advanced regular expressions.
Automated the creation of templates for structural document recognition, facilitating the integration of new formats.
Built unit tests using real dataset samples, ensuring robustness in multiple scenarios.
Integrated external platforms with Hospy, contributing to increased customer acquisition.
Delivered an automated web service that records Typeform responses and generates dashboards and PDF reports.
Reduced platform loading times by 70% through performance optimization (caching, lazy-loading, efficient SQL queries).
Implemented unit tests that improved code quality and reliability.
Automated employee data pipelines for performance metrics and evaluations, accelerating report generation processes.

projects.title: ChekiBot
projects.description: A sophisticated conversational AI system built with Python, FastAPI, and LangChain Core, designed to provide intelligent chatbot capabilities using various language models including Nebius and OpenAI. This project was developed for chequeabolivia.bo.

projects.title: Botcachino
projects.description: An agentic AI chatbot for academic schedule management at Universidad Mayor de San Simón. Built with LangGraph for multi-step reasoning, PostgreSQL for state persistence, and MCP protocol for tool integration. Handles course inquiries, timetable organization, and multi-turn scheduling conversations.

projects.title: FaceMasker
projects.description: Real-time face mask detection system using deep learning. Uses PyTorch with a pre-trained CNN model to classify whether individuals are wearing masks in images. Includes trained models, test suite, and Docker deployment.

projects.title: Green Recovery (Pix2Pix)
projects.description: Image-to-image translation model using Pix2Pix GANs for environmental recovery visualization. Trains a conditional GAN to transform satellite imagery, with custom dataset pipeline, training loop, and loss optimization. Demonstrates deep understanding of generative AI architectures.
